symptom_vector: pod failure with database region unavailable errors and extreme latency spikes

expert_knowledge.root_cause_desc: tidb-tikv 存储节点故障导致 store_unhealth_count 增加，进而引发数据库 Region 不可用错误和极端延迟
reasoning_chain: Step 1: 观察到 tidb-pd 的 store_unhealth_count 指标从 0 增加到 1，表明有存储节点不可用
Step 2: 分析 productcatalogservice 日志中出现大量 'Error 9005 (HY000): Region is unavailable' 错误，总计 495 次，确认数据库 Region 不可用
Step 3: 确认 productcatalogservice 的 GetProduct 操作延迟从正常约 10 秒激增至 3900 万秒，延迟倍数超过 3900 倍，且错误类型为数据库 Region 不可用

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Extreme latency spike from baseline (e.g., 10s to 39 million seconds)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 productcatalogservice 的 GetProduct 操作延迟是否出现极端飙升

critical_checks.expected_pattern: High error rate with 'Error 9005 (HY000): Region is unavailable' messages
critical_checks.instruction: 分析调用链中的错误比例，特别是数据库 Region 不可用错误

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Contains 'Error 9005 (HY000): Region is unavailable' in productcatalogservice logs
critical_checks.instruction: 在 productcatalogservice 日志中搜索 'Error 9005 (HY000): Region is unavailable' 关键词

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Multiple occurrences of 'Region is unavailable' error messages
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 productcatalogservice 日志中 'Region is unavailable' 错误的出现频率和分布

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Increase from 0 to 1 indicating storage node failure
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 tidb-pd 组件的 store_unhealth_count 指标是否从 0 增加到 1

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Dramatic increase in response time (e.g., from 7.18ms to 19.13s)
critical_checks.instruction: 分析 productcatalogservice 的 rrt 指标是否出现急剧恶化

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Significant spike in 99th percentile duration (e.g., from 0.01s to 64.88s)
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 tidb-tidb 组件的 duration_99th 指标是否异常飙升

critical_checks.expected_pattern: Abnormal drop in CPU usage (e.g., from 0.04 to 0.0) indicating pod restart or failure
critical_checks.instruction: 检查 productcatalogservice-0 和 frontend-2 的 pod_cpu_usage 指标是否异常下降
